title: A ‘huge’ shape-shifting cloud-like UFO was spotted in Belo Horizonte-MG [1974]

text_preview:
APRIL 7th, 1974. Time: 18:10. Duration: 3 to 5 minutes. In Carlos Prates, region of Belo Horizonte, State of Minas Gerais.

## TRANSLATION

“Observers:

Group 1: M.M. and 4 children

Group 2: 9 people of G.L.’s family

Researchers who interviewed the witnesses: Húlvio Brant (CICOANI) and Pierre Doransart, from the group “Lumière dans la Nuit”, from Paris-France.

## 1) Telephone interview:

M.M .: His wife arrived at the kitchen door to observe the sky in the direction of BR-135 and called him afterwards. Upon arriving he had the impression of seeing a moving cloud, but soon he noticed somethi
summary: Multiple witnesses in Belo Horizonte on Apr 7 1974 observed a huge shape-shifting dark cloud-like object that at times assumed a clear disc/saucer shape, moving erratically for 3-5 minutes.
